title: Bunny line side-effects from botulinum toxin: what can go wrong？
filename: Bunny line side-effects from botulinum toxin： what can go wrong？.en.vtt
excerpt: So side effects of treating bunny lines with botulinum toxins predominantly about treating the wrong muscle or over treating that area [Music] think about where you're treating with so-called bunny line treatments we're treating just here at the bridge of the nose where you might…

segments.text: so side effects of treating bunny lines with botulinum toxins predominantly about treating the wrong muscle or over treating that area [Music] think about where you're treating with so-called bunny line treatments we're treating just here at the bridge of the nose where you might get little lines here now that's very close to the lip elevators so the worst side effect that you can get is probably an asymmetrical relaxation of the lip elevator so one side of the elevator labiai elect nasi muscle is relaxed and the other side is not and so when you smile you get an asymmetrical smile with a pull in one direction probably after that would be a relaxation of both sides which i've seen a couple of times that's a bit like a gummy smile treatment which doesn't mean it looks good if you don't need your gummy a gummy smile treatment and you have one you end up with a lip that's too low when you smile and you often get too much elevation at the sides it's kind of a joker smile so it's not very attractive and your patient will not be very happy and will probably take six to 12 weeks for it to go away and those are the main side effects for uh for the bunny line treatment apart from all the normal ones which are bruising

and redness and swelling and those kind of things but it's more about relaxing than the wrong muscle or asymmetrical relaxation of muscle and that's what upsets patients if it does happen hope that helps

transcript: so side effects of treating bunny lines with botulinum toxins predominantly about treating the wrong muscle or over treating that area [Music] think about where you're treating with so-called bunny line treatments we're treating just here at the bridge of the nose where you might get little lines here now that's very close to the lip elevators so the worst side effect that you can get is probably an asymmetrical relaxation of the lip elevator so one side of the elevator labiai elect nasi muscle is relaxed and the other side is not and so when you smile you get an asymmetrical smile with a pull in one direction probably after that would be a relaxation of both sides which i've seen a couple of times that's a bit like a gummy smile treatment which doesn't mean it looks good if you don't need your gummy a gummy smile treatment and you have one you end up with a lip that's too low when you smile and you often get too much elevation at the sides it's kind of a joker smile so it's not very attractive and your patient will not be very happy and will probably take six to 12 weeks for it to go away and those are the main side effects for uh for the bunny line treatment apart from all the normal ones which are bruising and redness and swelling and those kind of things but it's more about relaxing than the wrong muscle or asymmetrical relaxation of muscle and that's what upsets patients if it does happen hope that helps
